notableEvents.label: Jacob Young GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jacob Young grounds into a double play, third baseman Alec Bohm to second baseman Bryson Stott to first baseman Bryce Harper. Dylan Crews scores. Jorbit Vivas out at 2nd. Jacob Young out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Marsh doubles (14) on a sharp line drive to right fielder James Wood. Brandon Marsh to 3rd. Brandon Marsh advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by right fielder James Wood.

notableEvents.label: Dylan Crews plunked
notableEvents.detail: Dylan Crews hit by pitch. Luis García Jr. to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Luis García Jr. pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luis García Jr. homers (12) on a fly ball to center field.

notableEvents.label: Bryson Stott GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Bryson Stott grounds into a double play, second baseman Jorbit Vivas to shortstop Nasim Nuñez to first baseman Andrés Chaparro. Alec Bohm out at 2nd. Bryson Stott out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Bryson Stott plunked
notableEvents.detail: Bryson Stott hit by pitch. Garrett Stubbs to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Derek Hill pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Derek Hill singles on a fly ball to left fielder Dylan Crews. Bryce Harper to 2nd.
